panels.description: ETCD Health server ratio, and number of Postgres cluster in Failsafe mode

targets.expr:
sum(up{job="etcd", cluster="etcd"}) by (cluster) /
 count(up{job="etcd", cluster="etcd"}) by (cluster)
or on() vector(0)

panels.description:
Blue = PostgreSQL

Green = Pgbouncer

Azure = Patroni

Purple = Postgres Exporter

Deep Purple = Pgbouncer Exporter

Gray = Pgbackrest Exporter

Orange = PG VIP
panels.title: Instances

panels.description:
PostgreSQL Cluster Load 5
Load = active session time / total cpu time, among the cluster, average in last 5 minute
panels.title: Cluster Std Load5

panels.description: Transactions committed + rollback per second in last 1 minute for all instances
panels.title: Instance TPS

panels.description: All postgresql instances in this FX deployment
panels.title: PGSQL Instances

panels.description:
Patroni responsible for Postgres HA

DCS Seen: time since last seen etcd

Paused: is in maintenance mode? (auto failover disabled)
 
Restart: is there any pending config change that requires restart?

Failsafe: in case of DCS failure, the failsafe mode is enabled to avoid split brain

Lock: if failsafe is active, the cluster is locked to prevent any failover

Postgres: the status of it's managed Postgres instance
panels.title: Patroni Members

panels.description: etcd is the DCS used by patroni
panels.title: ETCD Aliveness

panels.description:
How long since patroni the HA agent successfully connect to DCS:etcd.
Max amoung cluster

value larger than 20s needs extra attention
panels.title: DCS Last Seen

panels.description: Time since patroni last successful connect to DCS:etcd service
panels.title: Patroni DCS Last Seen

panels.description: Services SLI is measured by Average Service UP time of last 1 day
